text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before we're supposed to run in the Kyoto
Daishoten, a certain piece of news drops.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow... So Suzuka managed to win the Mainichi
Okan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is a powerful force in the racing
world. She's amassed a large number of fans with
her unreal speed, earning her the nickname
"Otherworldly Front-Runner."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And she left Grass and El in the dust?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That sure is otherwordly. Tokyo Racecourse must have been raving.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I guess so... Yeah, we gotta end big!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not really. It's just way more fun to get other
people hyped.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If Suzuka used her speed to pull ahead, that
means...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can win if I use my special magic. ♪ Let's go
light up Kyoto!
